message:
chore: code cleanup - clippy lints, formatting, remove duplicate function

This commit applies various code quality improvements:

## src/context.rs
- Use `Cow::Owned` directly instead of closure wrapper (clippy lint)

## src/heredoc.rs
- Use `map_or` instead of `map().unwrap_or()` (clippy lint)
- Formatting improvements (rustfmt)
- Fix heredoc body extraction to skip leading newline properly
- Use format string syntax for panic messages

## src/main.rs
- Remove duplicate `normalize_command` function (already exists in packs/mod.rs)
- The function was dead code after integration changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
